title: Understanding Forces
text: To find the acceleration, consider the forces acting on the body. The upward force is $$25.0$$ N, and the downward force is the weight of the body.

title: Calculate the Weight
text: The weight of the body can be calculated using the formula: weight $$=$$ mass times gravitational acceleration (g $$=$$ $$9.8$$ m/s**2).

title: Calculate the Net Force
text: The net force is the difference between the upward force and the weight of the body. Calculate the net force.

title: Find the Acceleration
text: Use Newton's second law: net force $$=$$ mass times acceleration. Solve for acceleration.
